OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Sacramento, Esq., for plaintiff Michael Fusaro. Jeff Appenrodt was present with authority for plaintiff.
Kwanyee Eva Auyeung, Esq., limited scope attorney for defendant Howard Kantor, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment and order thereon for property located at 300 Vicksburg Street, #3, San Francisco, California was filed. See scanned document. Trial date vacated. Judge pro tem Tony Schoenberg. Clerk Garth Sayers. Not reported. (218)
